entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: Main source for nourishing natural life on earth, subject to various environmental stresses

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by high temperatures, a major threat to sustainable agriculture

entities.name: CHILLING STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by low temperatures, a major threat to sustainable agriculture

entities.name: FREEZING STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by temperatures below freezing, a major threat to sustainable agriculture

entities.name: TEMPERATURE STRESS
entities.description: General term for heat, chilling, and freezing stresses that affect plant development

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practices aimed at long-term viability and environmental health

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH AND DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological process of plant maturation, hindered by temperature stress

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: Reduction in crop output caused by environmental stresses

entities.name: ZERO HUNGER
entities.description: A global goal proposed by the FAO to eliminate hunger

entities.name: OMICS
entities.description: High-throughput biological technologies used to explore stress-responsive mechanisms

entities.name: STRESS-RESPONSIVE MECHANISMS AND PATHWAYS
entities.description: Biological processes and pathways that plants activate in response to stress

entities.name: STRESS SIGNALING
entities.description: The process of perceiving and transmitting signals in response to environmental stress

entities.name: STRESS ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of plants to adjust their physiology to survive stress

entities.name: TOLERANCE MECHANISMS
entities.description: Biological mechanisms that allow plants to withstand adverse conditions

entities.name: INTEGRATED OMICS
entities.description: The combination of multiple omics technologies for comprehensive biological analysis

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: Technology used to make precise modifications to the plant genome

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: Techniques used to accelerate the generation cycle of crops

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The overall process of producing crops to feed the global population

entities.name: METABOLITES
entities.description: Small molecule chemical compounds involved in metabolism

entities.name: PROTEINS
entities.description: Large biomolecules that execute biological functions

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION
entities.description: The process by which information from a gene is used in the synthesis of a functional gene product

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL AND BIOCHEMICAL PROCESSES
entities.description: The biological functions and chemical reactions occurring within a plant
